core_laws: User-taught local skills survive official core updates.
Medium, high, and locked actions require confirmation unless explicitly trusted.
Emergency pause/takeover must interrupt active automation.

medium.description: Settings changes or multi-step workflows that can affect the user's environment.

high.description: Delete, send, spend, share, account-altering, or external-impact actions.

locked.description: Irreversible, financial, identity, or physical-world actions requiring explicit unlock and review.
